wcat-decision-a2402099-2025-07-30.lesson: Repeat AI-citation offenders are labeled vexatious; track prior incidents before filing in any tribunal.

chanda-v-royal-mail-group-ltd-2025-07-28.lesson: UK tribunals require claimants to account for every citation; concede inability to locate before oral argument, not after.

shenaar-v-the-quarries-rehabilitation-fu.lesson: Israeli courts reject 'technical error' defenses for fabricated citations; own the AI use or face cost-shifting plus fines.

silva-cordeiro-v-municipio-de-santana-do.lesson: Brazilian courts now auto-notify OAB for fabricated quotes; assume any false citation triggers a disciplinary referral.

hakemi-v-icbc-2025-07-24.lesson: Fabricated statutory citations are as disqualifying as fake caselaw; verify every section number against primary sources.

hmrc-v-gunnarson-2025-07-23.lesson: Opposing counsel will independently verify skeleton citations; expect HMRC-level scrutiny in any tax appeal.

pennytech-inc-v-superior-building-group-.lesson: Every neutral citation must be clicked and read; AI frequently generates real-looking citations pointing to unrelated cases.

moradi-v-british-columbia-human-rights-t.lesson: ChatGPT-generated case indexes are now a named cost-allocation factor; name the tool used when challenged.

blaser-v-campbell-2025-07-15.lesson: BC tribunals now routinely flag AI hallucinations sua sponte; do not assume low-stakes matters escape scrutiny.

fam-v-zam-2025-07-15.lesson: Tanzanian courts now issue published reminders of advocate duties re AI; treat every jurisdiction as enforcement-active.

ps-v-london-borough-of-wandsworth-2025-0.lesson: Valid neutral citations paired with wrong case summaries are a signature AI error; verify the case body, not just the cite.

zlatin-v-assayag-et-al-2025-07-11.lesson: Filing an AI-generated draft with placeholder prompts triggers exemplary costs; require a final-review checklist before submission.

lloyds-register-canada-v-munchang-choi-2.lesson: Federal Court of Canada's AI Practice Direction requires an affirmative declaration; silence plus fabrication escalates to vexatious status.

di-rocco-isabelle-corte-di-cassazione-se.lesson: Italian Cassazione will quash lower-court rulings citing nonexistent Supreme Court precedents; judges must verify their own cites.

ncr-v-kkb-2025-07-09.lesson: Alberta courts disregard fabricated citations without costs for pro-se parties; do not rely on that leniency if you are counsel.

dhuruvasangary-v-toronto-standard-condom.lesson: Tribunals now ignore arguments built on fabricated citations entirely; hallucinated cases cost the filer the issue, not just credibility.

case-no-14748-08-21-2025-07-09.lesson: Blaming the software or an intern is not a defense; the signing attorney owns every citation regardless of tool or delegation.

vgh-3-s-101225-vg-2-k-189925-2025-07-08.lesson: German administrative courts treat mass-fabricated citations as lack of substantive engagement, forfeiting the appeal on the merits.

various-leaseholders-v-assethold-limited.lesson: When a filing contains eleven-plus flagged citations, tribunals infer systemic AI use; require line-by-line verification logs before submission.

aq-v-bw-2025-07-04.lesson: BC CRT now awards time-wasted costs for AI-fabricated statutory text; hallucinated norms are as sanctionable as fake cases.
